design_philosophy.strategy: Mobile-first, high-conversion emergency landing page. Minimize cognitive load with massive, highly visible CTAs. Use high-contrast dark mode with electric yellow for primary actions. Incorporate sticky mobile call buttons to capture leads immediately.

rules: Headings must use tight letter spacing (tracking-tight or tighter)
Overlines/Labels must be uppercase with wide spacing (tracking-[0.2em])
Ensure minimum 4.5:1 contrast ratio for all text

layout.spacing_scale: Tailwind standard (p-4, p-8, p-16, p-24). Use generous padding in desktop, tight but thumb-friendly in mobile.
layout.alignment: Left-align dense text. Center-align hero headings for impact.

buttons.primary: bg-yellow-500 text-black hover:bg-yellow-600 font-bold rounded-none or small radius (rounded-md), uppercase tracking-wide px-8 py-4
buttons.secondary: bg-green-500 text-white hover:bg-green-600 font-bold rounded-md px-8 py-4
buttons.outline: border-2 border-yellow-500 text-yellow-500 hover:bg-yellow-500 hover:text-black font-bold px-8 py-4
buttons.sticky_mobile: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 grid grid-cols-2 gap-2 p-2 bg-black/90 backdrop-blur-md border-t border-zinc-800 md:hidden

cards.style: bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 rounded-lg p-6 hover:border-yellow-500/50 transition-colors

header.style: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10 py-4

hero_background.description: Parked electric scooter on city street, used as darkened background for hero section (bg-black/60 overlay required)

service_board.description: Close up of complex circuit board for diagnostic service visual

texture_bg.description: Dark black texture for section background separation

specific_instructions_for_main_agent: Ensure all buttons and links have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='hero-call-btn').
Use a pure black (#0A0A0A) background for the body, avoiding flat grays to maintain the industrial vibe.
Implement a sticky mobile bottom bar containing two half-width buttons: 'Call Now' (Yellow) and 'WhatsApp' (Green) only visible on md:hidden breakpoints.
The hero section MUST use the hero_background image with a heavy bg-black/60 or bg-black/70 overlay so the white and yellow text is highly legible.
Use Lucide-react or Phosphor icons for service features (Lightning, Wrench, ShieldCheck, PhoneCall).
Ensure the layout is highly readable on mobile devices. Use p-4 padding globally on mobile, scaling up to p-12 on desktop.
Make sure all phone numbers (8178625048) are wrapped in <a href='tel:8178625048'> tags to enable one-click calling.
Make sure WhatsApp CTA uses <a href='https://wa.me/918178625048'> (assuming +91 for India).

accessibility.contrast: Minimum 4.5:1 for normal text, 3:1 for large text
